task_completion.description: Load the sales_data and quota_targets files into Power BI
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Data pane on the right side of Power BI Desktop. Verify that both 'sales_data' and 'quota_targets' tables are listed.
Look at the Data pane. Verify that there are calculator icons indicating measures named 'Total_Sales', 'Attainment_Pct', and 'Commission_Payout'.

task_completion.description: Create a Matrix visual with the specified fields
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the report canvas. Verify there is a Matrix (table-like) visual that includes columns for Sales_Rep, Total_Sales, Quota, Attainment_Pct, and Commission_Payout.

task_completion.description: Create a Scatter Chart with Attainment_Pct and Commission_Payout
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the report canvas. Verify there is a Scatter Chart visual. Check the visualizations pane or the chart axes to confirm Attainment_Pct is on the X-axis and Commission_Payout is on the Y-axis.

task_completion.description: Export the Matrix data to CSV and save the Power BI report
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Desktop or a File Explorer window. Verify the presence of both 'Commission_Model.pbix' and 'commission_report.csv'.

integrity.description: Agent used Power BI Desktop to build the model and visuals
integrity.visual_evidence: The Power BI Desktop interface should be visible in the screenshots, showing genuine interaction with the tool to create the report.

integrity.description: The visuals display the actual dataset values
integrity.visual_evidence: The Matrix visual should show actual sales rep names (Alice, Bob, Charlie, David, Eve) and realistic numerical values, indicating the data was properly loaded and processed.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent using terminal commands or Python scripts to generate the .pbix and .csv files without interacting with Power BI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 5 sales reps: Alice, Bob, Charlie, David, Eve. Total sales sum is $5,019,265.23. Commission logic: <80% attainment = $0, 80-110% = 5% of Total_Sales, >110% = 8% of Total_Sales. Required output files are 'Commission_Model.pbix' and 'commission_report.csv' located on the Desktop.
